name: Multipliers
statement: Ayrat has number n, represented as it's prime factorization pi of size m, i.e. n = p1·p2·...·pm. Ayrat got secret information that that the product of all divisors of n taken modulo 109 + 7 is the password to the secret data base. Now he wants to calculate this value.
